scripts.db:migrate:local: for f in drizzle/000*.sql; do echo "Applying $f..."; wrangler d1 execute sv_project --local --file="$f"; done
scripts.db:migrate:remote: for f in drizzle/000*.sql; do echo "Applying $f..."; wrangler d1 execute sv_project --remote --file="$f"; done
scripts.db:seed:local: wrangler d1 execute sv_project --local --file=drizzle/seed_projects.sql && wrangler d1 execute sv_project --local --file=drizzle/seed_experiences.sql
scripts.db:seed:remote: wrangler d1 execute sv_project --remote --file=drizzle/seed_projects.sql && wrangler d1 execute sv_project --remote --file=drizzle/seed_experiences.sql
